MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. JONATHAN VAKNIN, Esq. of The Vaknin Law Firm (Tel: 415-851-5297) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Dismissal Under C.C.P. 664.6 & Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to vacate dismissal under CCP 664.6 & enter judgment pursuant to stipulation" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
